LITTLEWIZARD-CALLBACK.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Put a card with [gold]Element[/gold] from your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
LITTLEWIZARD-CALLBACK.title: Call Back
LITTLEWIZARD-COLORFUL_BALLS.title: Colorful Balls
LITTLEWIZARD-DEFEND_LITTLE_WIZARD.title: Defend
LITTLEWIZARD-STRIKE_LITTLE_WIZARD.title: Strike
LITTLEWIZARD-WAND_STRIKE.title: Wand Strike
LITTLEWIZARD-WAND_STRIKE.description:
Deal {CalculatedDamage:diff()} damage. 
 If the enemy has [gold]Block[/gold], deal double damage.
LITTLEWIZARD-FIREBALL.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. Apply {FireElement:diff()} [gold]Fire Element[/gold].
The first time this card is played this turn, it costs 0{energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}.
LITTLEWIZARD-FIREBALL.title: Fire Ball
LITTLEWIZARD-WATERBALL.title: Water Ball
LITTLEWIZARD-WATERBALL.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. Apply {WaterElement:diff()} [gold]Water Element[/gold].
The first time this card is played this turn, it costs 0{energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}.
LITTLEWIZARD-ROCKBALL.title: Rock Ball
LITTLEWIZARD-ROCKBALL.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. Apply {EarthElement:diff()} [gold]Earth Element[/gold].
The first time this card is played this turn, it costs 0{energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}.
LITTLEWIZARD-ACCELERATE_BURNING.descript:
Apply {CalculationBase:diff()} [gold]Fire Element[/gold].
Apply {CalculationExtra:diff()} additional [gold]Fire Element[/gold] for every {Threshold:diff()} [gold]Fire Element[/gold] on the enemy. 
 (Apply {CalculatedFireElement:diff()} [gold]Fire Element[/gold])
LITTLEWIZARD-ACCELERATE_BURNING.title: Accelerate Burning
LITTLEWIZARD-FREEZING_RAY.description: Deal 3 damage {Repeat:diff()} times for each [gold]Water Element[/gold] on the enemy.
LITTLEWIZARD-FREEZING_RAY.title: Freezing Ray
LITTLEWIZARD-EARTHBOUND.title: Earth Bound
LITTLEWIZARD-EARTHBOUND.description:
Gain {CalculatedBlock:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Gain {CalculationExtra:diff()} additional Block for each [gold]Earth Element[/gold] on the enemy.
LITTLEWIZARD-DEADLINE_DASH.title: Deadline Dash
LITTLEWIZARD-DEADLINE_DASH.description:
If you don't have {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}, gain {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)};
 If you have {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}, draw 1 card.
LITTLEWIZARD-ANVIL_TRANSFER.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. 
 Randomly [gold]Upgrade[/gold] {Cards:diff()} card(s) in your [gold]Hand[/gold].
LITTLEWIZARD-ANVIL_TRANSFER.title: Anvil Transfer
LITTLEWIZARD-TEMPORARY_HANDWRITING.title: Temporary Handwriting
LITTLEWIZARD-TEMPORARY_HANDWRITING.descr:
Draw {Cards:diff()} cards. 
 If you have 4 or fewer cards in your [gold]Hand[/gold], draw {ExtraCards:diff()} additional cards.
LITTLEWIZARD-REST_MOMENT.title: Rest Moment
LITTLEWIZARD-WHIM.title: Whim
LITTLEWIZARD-DESTROY_GRADES.title: Destroy Grades
LITTLEWIZARD-DESTROY_GRADES.description:
Apply {FireElement:diff()} [gold]Fire Element[/gold] to an enemy. 
 Choose 1 card in your [gold]Hand[/gold] and [gold]Exhaust[/gold] it.
LITTLEWIZARD-NUMB_HANDS.title: Numb Hands
LITTLEWIZARD-REMOVE_DEFENSE.title: Remove Defense
LITTLEWIZARD-REMOVE_DEFENSE.description:
Remove all [gold]Block[/gold] from the enemy.
Apply {VulnerablePower:diff()} [gold]Vulnerable[/gold].
LITTLEWIZARD-MAGIC_MISSILE.title: Magic Missile
LITTLEWIZARD-MAGIC_MISSILE.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to random enemies X squared times.
LITTLEWIZARD-WARMUP_BEAM.title: Warmup Beam
LITTLEWIZARD-WARMUP_BEAM.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. 
 When the enemy receives [gold]Element[/gold], apply {WarmupBeamPower:diff()} additional [gold]Element[/gold] this turn.
LITTLEWIZARD-EROSION_RAY.title: Erosion Ray
LITTLEWIZARD-EROSION_RAY.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. Double 1 random debuff on the enemy.
LITTLEWIZARD-PROPHECY.title: Prophecy
LITTLEWIZARD-PROPHECY.description: Put {Cards:diff()} cards from your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold] on top of your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
LITTLEWIZARD-WAVE.title: Wave
LITTLEWIZARD-WAVE.description: Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold]. Apply {WaterElement:diff()} [gold]Water Element[/gold] to ALL enemies.
LITTLEWIZARD-ELEMENT_DRAW.title: Element Draw
LITTLEWIZARD-ELEMENT_DRAW.description: If the enemy has [gold]Element[/gold], remove up to 10 [gold]Element[/gold] and gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.
LITTLEWIZARD-GATHER_ELEMENTS.title: Gather Elements
LITTLEWIZARD-GATHER_ELEMENTS.description:
At the start of your turn, put {GatherElementsPower:diff()} cards with [gold]Element[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold]. {IfUpgraded:show:
This card costs 0{energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} this turn.|}
LITTLEWIZARD-MANA_CONVERT.title: Mana Convert
LITTLEWIZARD-MANA_CONVERT.description:
[gold]Exhaust[/gold] any number of cards with [gold]Element[/gold] in your hand. 
Gain {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} for each card you [gold]Exhaust[/gold].
LITTLEWIZARD-MANAGER_MASTER.title: Manager Master
LITTLEWIZARD-MANAGER_MASTER.description: Whenever you spend {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}, the next [gold]Ethereal[/gold] card you play costs 0 {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}.
LITTLEWIZARD-HUGE_FIREBALL.title: Huge Fire Ball
LITTLEWIZARD-HUGE_FIREBALL.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies. 
Apply {FireElement:diff()} [gold]Fire Element[/gold].
LITTLEWIZARD-STALAGMITE.title: Stalagmite
LITTLEWIZARD-BURN_OUT.title: Burn Out
LITTLEWIZARD-BURN_OUT.description: For every 2 [gold]Fire Element[/gold] on the enemy, deal {ExtraDamage:diff()} damage.
LITTLEWIZARD-ICE_BLOCK.title: Ice Block
LITTLEWIZARD-ICE_BLOCK.description: If the enemy has at least {WaterElement:diff()} [gold]Water Element[/gold], remove up to 6 [gold]Water Element[/gold] and [gold]Stun[/gold] the enemy.
LITTLEWIZARD-ADAPT.title: Adapt
LITTLEWIZARD-ADAPT.description:
If the enemy has: 
[gold]Fire Element[/gold]: draw 2 cards.
[gold]Water Element[/gold]: gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.
[gold]Earth Element[/gold]: gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
LITTLEWIZARD-EXPLORE_TABOO.title: Explore Taboo
LITTLEWIZARD-EXPLORE_TABOO.description:
Apply 4 [gold]Fire Element[/gold] to yourself.
At the start of each turn, gain {ExploreTabooPower:diff()} {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}.
LITTLEWIZARD-ELEMENT_CONVERT.title: Element Convert
LITTLEWIZARD-ELEMENT_CONVERT.description:
Convert [gold]Element[/gold] on the enemy into another. 
Convert [gold]Fire Element[/gold] into [gold]Water Element[/gold]. 
Convert [gold]Water Element[/gold] into [gold]Earth Element[/gold]. 
Convert [gold]Earth Element[/gold] into [gold]Fire Element[/gold].
{IfUpgraded:show: Return this card to your [gold]Hand[/gold].|}
LITTLEWIZARD-ELEMENT_BURST.title: Element Burst
LITTLEWIZARD-ELEMENT_BURST.description:
If the enemy has [gold]Element[/gold], apply {AnyElement:diff()} of the same [gold]Element[/gold].
Apply {AnyElement:diff()} additional Element for every 5 Element.
LITTLEWIZARD-EARTH_FURY.title: Earth Fury
LITTLEWIZARD-EARTH_FURY.description:
Deal damage that equals to the half of [gold]Block[/gold] you have.
Apply [gold]Earth Element[/gold] that equals to the half of [gold]block [/gold] you have.
LITTLEWIZARD-WATER_BLADE.title: Water Blade
LITTLEWIZARD-START_OVER.title: Start Over
LITTLEWIZARD-START_OVER.description: [gold]Exhaust[/gold] all cards in your [gold]Hand[/gold]. Draw the same number of cards.
LITTLEWIZARD-MANA_BURST.title: Mana Burst
LITTLEWIZARD-DEEPEN_MEMORY.title: Deepen Memory
LITTLEWIZARD-DEEPEN_MEMORY.description: Copy 1 card in your [gold]Hand[/gold] and add it into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
LITTLEWIZARD-MEMORY_PALACE.title: Memory Palace
LITTLEWIZARD-MEMORY_PALACE.description: Copy {Cards:diff()} cards from your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold] and add them into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
LITTLEWIZARD-FOCUSED_CASTING.title: Focused Casting
LITTLEWIZARD-FOCUSED_CASTING.description: This turn, whenever you apply [gold]Element[/gold], apply {FocusedCastingPower:diff()} additional [gold]Element[/gold].
LITTLEWIZARD-LIKE_NEW.title: Like New
LITTLEWIZARD-LIKE_NEW.description: [gold]Exhaust[/gold] 1 card. Add a random card into your [gold]Hand[/gold]. This combat, its cost is equal to the cost of the exhausted card.
LITTLEWIZARD-DEEP_THOUGHT.title: Deep Thought
LITTLEWIZARD-DEEP_THOUGHT.description:
End your turn.
[gold]Retain[/gold] your remaining energy and your [gold]Hand[/gold].
LITTLEWIZARD-EARTHQUAKE.title: Earthquake
LITTLEWIZARD-EARTHQUAKE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
Apply {EarthElement:diff()} [gold]Earth Element[/gold] and {WeakPower:diff()} [gold]Weak[/gold] to ALL enemies.
LITTLEWIZARD-FLAT_TUMBLE.title: Flat Tumble
LITTLEWIZARD-FLAT_TUMBLE.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Return this card to your [gold]Hand[/gold].
LITTLEWIZARD-FLUSTERED.title: Flustered
LITTLEWIZARD-FLUSTERED.description:
Draw to fill your [gold]Hand[/gold].
Whenever you play a card this turn, draw 1 card.
LITTLEWIZARD-WATER_UNDER_THE_BRIDGE.desc: The first time you play an [gold]Ethereal[/gold] card each turn, gain {WaterUnderTheBridgePower:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
LITTLEWIZARD-HAIL.title: Hail
LITTLEWIZARD-HAIL.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Apply {WaterElement:diff()} [gold]Water Element[/gold]. 
At the start of your turn, if this is in your [gold]Exhaust Pile[/gold], play it.
LITTLEWIZARD-LIFE_DRAIN.title: Life Drain
LITTLEWIZARD-LINGERING_THOUGHT.title: Lingering Thought
LITTLEWIZARD-LINGERING_THOUGHT.descripti: Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold]. Add [gold]Retain[/gold] to {Cards:diff()} card(s) in your [gold]Hand[/gold].
LITTLEWIZARD-MORNING_GRUMPINESS.title: Morning Grumpiness
LITTLEWIZARD-MORNING_GRUMPINESS.descript:
End your turn.
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Gain {Stun:diff()} [gold]Stun[/gold]. When [gold]Stun[/gold] is removed, gain {Strength:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold] permanently this combat.
[gold]Stun[/gold] will be removed when you lose HP.
LITTLEWIZARD-ROCK_WALL.title: Rock Wall
LITTLEWIZARD-ROCK_WALL.description: Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold]. Double the next [gold]Earth Element[/gold] you apply.
LITTLEWIZARD-SPREAD.title: Spread
LITTLEWIZARD-SPREAD.description: Apply all [gold]Element[/gold] on the target enemy to ALL other enemies.
LITTLEWIZARD-WILD_SWING.title: Wild Swing
LITTLEWIZARD-WILD_SWING.description:
Gain 1 [gold]Vulnerable[/gold].
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies {Repeat:diff()}+X times.
LITTLEWIZARD-REJUVENATION.title: Rejuvenation
LITTLEWIZARD-REJUVENATION.description: Choose {Cards:diff()} card(s) in your [gold]Hand[/gold] and remove them from your deck after combat.
LITTLEWIZARD-BURN_EVERYTHING.title: Burn Everything
LITTLEWIZARD-BURN_EVERYTHING.description:
Apply {FireElement:diff()}X [gold]Fire Element[/gold] to ALL enemies. 
At the end of enemy turn, apply {BurnEverythingPower:diff()} [gold]Fire Element[/gold].
LITTLEWIZARD-CHILD_BODY.title: Child Body
LITTLEWIZARD-CHILD_BODY.description:
At the start of your turn, lose {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}. 
At the end of your turn, you no longer discard your [gold]Hand[/gold].
LITTLEWIZARD-COPYING.title: Copying
LITTLEWIZARD-COPYING.description: Choose up to {Cards:diff()} cards from 9 random cards from other characters and add them into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
LITTLEWIZARD-COPYING.selectionScreenProm: Choose cards to add into your Hand
LITTLEWIZARD-ELEMENT_BLESSING.title: Element Blessing
LITTLEWIZARD-ELEMENT_BLESSING.descriptio: Every 2 cards with [gold]Element[/gold] you play, gain {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}.
LITTLEWIZARD-EMERGE.title: Emerge
LITTLEWIZARD-EMERGE.description: When the enemy triggers [gold]Element Synergy[/gold], {IfUpgraded:show:have a chance to apply a large amount of random [gold]Element[/gold] to the enemy.|have a chance to apply random [gold]Element[/gold] to the enemy.}
LITTLEWIZARD-ENDLESS_WALL.title: Endless Wall
LITTLEWIZARD-ENDLESS_WALL.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Put this card into your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
LITTLEWIZARD-GUIDANCE.title: Guidance
LITTLEWIZARD-HEALING_CURSE.title: Healing Curse
LITTLEWIZARD-MANA_SHIELD.title: Mana Shield
LITTLEWIZARD-MANA_SHIELD.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
At the start of your turn, gain 3 [gold]Block[/gold].
Whenever you play a card with [gold]Element[/gold], gain 2 [gold]Block[/gold].
LITTLEWIZARD-MANA_SURGE.title: Mana Surge
LITTLEWIZARD-CELESTIAL_ROCK_SPELL.title: Celestial Rock Spell
LITTLEWIZARD-CELESTIAL_ROCK_SPELL.descri:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to a random enemy.
Apply {FireElement:diff()} [gold]Fire Element[/gold].
LITTLEWIZARD-NOT_MY_TIME.title: Not My Time
LITTLEWIZARD-NOT_MY_TIME.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. Play {Cards:diff()} random [gold]Attack[/gold] cards from your [gold]Exhaust Pile[/gold].
LITTLEWIZARD-PETRIFICATION.title: Petrification
LITTLEWIZARD-PETRIFICATION.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
 Each time this card is played, increase its [gold]Block[/gold] by {IncreasedBlock:diff()} this combat.
LITTLEWIZARD-PASS_OVER.title: Pass Over
LITTLEWIZARD-PASS_OVER.description: Discard all cards in your [gold]Hand[/gold]. Draw the same number of cards.
LITTLEWIZARD-RECALL.title: Recall
LITTLEWIZARD-SELF_HYPNOSIS.title: Self Hypnosis
LITTLEWIZARD-SELF_HYPNOSIS.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Add or remove [gold]Ethereal[/gold] from up to {Cards:diff()} cards in your [gold]Hand[/gold].
LITTLEWIZARD-SIMPLE_TRICK.title: Simple Trick
LITTLEWIZARD-THESIS.title: Thesis
LITTLEWIZARD-THESIS.description: The first card you play each turn costs 0 {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}.
LITTLEWIZARD-THORN_GROWTH.title: Thorn Growth
LITTLEWIZARD-THORN_GROWTH.description: All players lose {HpLoss:diff()} HP. Gain {ThornsPower:diff()} [gold]Thorn[/gold] and {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
LITTLEWIZARD-TIDAL_WAVE.title: Tidal Wave
LITTLEWIZARD-TIDAL_WAVE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to the enemy {IfUpgraded:show:4|3} times.
For every 2 [gold]Water-Earth[/gold] or [gold]Water-Fire[/gold] combinations on the enemy, apply 1 [gold]Water Element[/gold].
LITTLEWIZARD-UNLEARNED.title: Unlearned
LITTLEWIZARD-UNLEARNED.description: Whenever you [gold]Exhaust[/gold] a card, gain {UnlearnedPower:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold] and {UnlearnedPower:diff()} [gold]Dexterity[/gold].
LITTLEWIZARD-WILD_MAGIC.title: Wild Magic
LITTLEWIZARD-WILD_MAGIC.description:
Double the damage you deal and [gold]Element[/gold] you apply. 
At the start of your turn, apply 4 [gold]Fire Element[/gold] to yourself.
LITTLEWIZARD-WIND_TECHNIQUE.title: Wind Technique
LITTLEWIZARD-WEAKENING_CURSE.title: Weakening Curse
LITTLEWIZARD-BREW_POTIONS.title: Brew Potions
LITTLEWIZARD-BREW_POTIONS.description: At the end of combat, gain {BrewPotionsPower:diff()} random Potions.
LITTLEWIZARD-IGNITE.title: Ignite
LITTLEWIZARD-IGNITE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
If the enemy has no [gold]Fire Element[/gold], apply [gold]Ignite[/gold].
If the enemy has [gold]Fire Element[/gold], put 2 random cards with [gold]Fire Element[/gold] from your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
LITTLEWIZARD-RETRAIN.title: Retrain
LITTLEWIZARD-WATER_VAPOUR.title: Water Vapour
LITTLEWIZARD-WATER_VAPOUR.description:
Remove all [gold]Artifact[/gold] from the enemy.
For each [gold]Artifact[/gold] removed, apply 1 [gold]Water Element[/gold] to the enemy.
At the start of the enemy's turn, apply {WaterVapourPower:diff()} [gold]Water Element[/gold].
LITTLEWIZARD-SHORT_CIRCUIT_WATER_BALL.de:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Remove all [gold]Artifact[/gold] from the enemy.
Apply {WaterElement:diff()} [gold]Water Element[/gold].
LITTLEWIZARD-REBIRTH_CEREMONY.title: Rebirth Ceremony
LITTLEWIZARD-REBIRTH_CEREMONY.descriptio:
Lose {HpLoss:diff()} HP.
Remove all [gold]Debuffs[/gold] from yourself.
LITTLEWIZARD-TURNBACK.title: Turn Back
LITTLEWIZARD-TURNBACK.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Put 3 cards from your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
LITTLEWIZARD-TURNBACK.selectionScreenPro: Choose cards to put into your Hand
LITTLEWIZARD-FROZEN_WORLD.title: Frozen World
LITTLEWIZARD-FROZEN_WORLD.description:
Gain {CalculatedBlock:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
If the enemy has at least 4 [gold]Water Element[/gold], gain {CalculationExtra:diff()} additional [gold]Block[/gold].
LITTLEWIZARD-EXTRACT.title: Extract
LITTLEWIZARD-OFFENSIVE_CONVERSION.title: Offensive Conversion
LITTLEWIZARD-OFFENSIVE_CONVERSION.descri:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Draw {Cards:diff()} cards. 
Draw {Cards:diff()} additional cards next turn.
LITTLEWIZARD-MAGIC_TRAJECTORY.title: Magic Trajectory
LITTLEWIZARD-MAGIC_TRAJECTORY.descriptio:
Draw {Cards:diff()} cards.
If the enemy has [gold]Element[/gold], remove up to 10 [gold]Element[/gold] and draw {ExtraCards:diff()} additional cards.
LITTLEWIZARD-COULD_NOT_PUT_IT_DOWN.title: Could Not Put It Down
LITTLEWIZARD-COULD_NOT_PUT_IT_DOWN.descr: The first [gold]Skill[/gold] card you play each turn is placed on top of your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
